method: Every entry below was read off the pre-rendered labelled contact sheets in tools/out/sheets/ with the Read tool. Coordinates are quoted exactly as printed under each character block. Cells that could not be identified are marked 'unknown'.
warnings: slimevariants_1: layout guess 'char8' is HALF WRONG. Only the TOP row of character blocks (0,0 / 1,0 / 2,0 / 3,0) contains art. The whole bottom row (0,1 / 1,1 / 2,1 / 3,1) is empty transparent cells. Treat as a 4-character sheet. Also, within each character the 4 'direction' rows are IDENTICAL — the 3 columns are a squash/bounce cycle, not a walk cycle. Usable directly (all facings look the same, which is correct for a blob).
slime_big_single / slime_king_single: 3x4 grid exists, but all 4 direction rows are identical; the 3 columns are a squash/stretch bounce. Non-directional by design.

witch1_cauldron_1 / witch2_cauldron_1: NOT a walk grid. The source is 96x192 = 3 cols x 4 rows at 32x48, but ONLY THE MIDDLE COLUMN has pixels; columns 0 and 2 are fully empty (the contact sheet paints them as solid orange/green empty-cell markers). What exists is a 4-frame front-facing 'stirring the cauldron' idle animation. Use as an animated prop/NPC, not as a walking character.

lantphant_rm_1: layout guess 'char8' is only partly right. Character blocks 0,0 and 0,1 are full 3-column strips. Blocks 1,0 / 1,1 / 2,0 / 2,1 / 3,0 / 3,1 have ONLY their middle column populated (single-column animation strips); cols 0 and 2 are empty. Also every 'direction' row of 0,0 / 0,1 looks front-facing — this is an idle/flicker animation set, not a 4-direction walk grid.

beast_hero_*_emote (all 5): layout guess 'single' (3x4 walk grid) is WRONG. All 12 frames are FRONT-FACING poses of the same hero as the matching beast_hero_N sheet, varying arm position / facial expression. These are emote/portrait pose sheets, not walk grids. Do not map them to down/left/right/up.

chocobos_saddle_1 / mondinos_1 / mondinos_saddle_1: 8 character blocks = 4 color morphs, each duplicated. The top-row block and its bottom-row twin are the same creature; the bottom-row copies are drawn WITH a baked-in elliptical ground shadow, the top-row ones WITHOUT. Prefer the top row (the engine draws its own shadows).

beast_tribe_5 char 1,1: a fishfolk in a hood rendered almost entirely in flat desaturated gray with almost no interior detail. Could be a shadow/silhouette palette variant or an unfinished cell — treat as low confidence.
warelementals_1 / warelementals_f_1: both decompose cleanly into 8 x (3 cols x 4 rows). No off-grid junk half (unlike wizard.png/elemental.png). Rows read down / left / right / up in the usual order.

shark_full_blue_1 / shark_full_brown_1: valid 3x4 grid, but the 'down' row is a head-on top-down view and the 'up' row is a tail-on top-down view. This is a top-down swim sheet; billboarding it in a first-person 3D world will look wrong from most angles unless you only ever use the left/right profile rows.

chars.who: Crimson armored elemental knight. Faceless helmet with a tall U-shaped red crest, red plate over gray metal limbs, blocky shoulders, no visible eyes or mouth.
chars.mobIdea: Ember Warplate — fire-elemental knight, melee cleave + burn DoT

chars.who: Blue armored knight, tall sharply pointed crested helm like a shark fin, spiky ice-blue plate with gold buckles at the waist.
Squat gray-stone golem body with jagged green crystal shards jutting out of the shoulders like wings, and a green crystal crest over a dark faceless head.
chars.mobIdea: Verdant Crystal Golem — slow, heavy slam, high armor

chars.who: White-and-gold armored elemental. Big golden flame-shaped plume erupting from the helm, gold pauldrons and greaves, orange trim.
chars.mobIdea: Solar Warden — radiant melee + light burst

chars.who: Pale ice-blue armored elemental with a rounded steel helm and layered icicle-like plates; silver-blue and gray, no facial features.
Deep red armored elemental with a rounded closed helm and glowing orange accent lines down the chest and boots.
chars.mobIdea: Magma Knight — melee with molten thorns

chars.who: Dark charcoal-gray rock body cracked with molten orange fissures, gold horn/wing plates sweeping off the head, chunky lava-lit limbs.
chars.mobIdea: Cinder Colossus — mini-boss for Cinderrift, lava splash

chars.who: Deep blue crystalline knight, tall faceted shard helm, blue-and-silver crystal plates.
Slim red-armored female elemental, tall red spike/plume headpiece rising off the helm, red flame-shaped plating over a gray core, narrow waist.
Gray-armored female with a large gold curved horn-loop headdress (like a lyre or crescent), gold belt and trim, orange glow at the hips.
Blue armored female with oversized angular blue pauldrons and a horned blue helm, white/silver limbs.
Spiky white crystal crown/hair fanning upward, green plate armor with yellow lightning-bolt accents on the arms and legs.
Light-blue female elemental, rounded helm topped with a pointed icicle spire, layered pale-blue ice plating.
Red female elemental with a single big red loop-horn arcing over the head, gray core armor, glowing orange molten belt and boot glow.
Green armored female with wide flared green shoulder plates and a white crest on the head, mossy green limbs.
Gray stone female with a spiky silver crown, orange lava accents at the waist and pale blue crystal bits on the forearms.

Short, chibi-proportioned witch. An oversized dark blue-gray pointed hat with a wide brim and a yellow band completely shadows the face; cream-colored hands peek out of a blue-gray robe with a yellow trimmed hem. The 'up' (back) row shows a mane of white/silver hair spilling out under the hat.
chars.mobIdea: Hedge Witch — hostile caster in a swamp/forest hut, hexes and slows

chars.who: Identical silhouette to witch1 but GREEN-SKINNED: same oversized blue-gray pointed hat with yellow band, blue-gray robe with yellow hem, but the hands and the sliver of face are bright green. White hair on the back view. A hag.
chars.mobIdea: Bog Hag — Gloomfen caster, poison DoT + curse

chars.who: The pale-skinned witch (gray-blue pointed hat, yellow hatband, orange-brown hair visible at the shoulders) standing behind a round stone cauldron full of bubbling green brew, stirring it with a brown wooden spoon. Four frames of the stir/bubble cycle. Left and right columns of the source image are fully empty.
chars.mobIdea: Cauldron Witch — static hostile NPC / quest-giver anchoring a hut prefab; animated idle

chars.who: Green-skinned hag version of the above: same gray-blue pointed hat with yellow band, white hair, green face and green hands, stirring a stone cauldron of bubbling green brew with a wooden spoon. Middle column only; other columns empty.
chars.mobIdea: Bog Hag at her cauldron — Gloomfen hut boss, brews the poison she throws

chars.who: Tall slim sorceress in a floor-length dark slate-blue gown that flares into a hem — no legs are drawn, she reads as gliding. Long straight silver-white hair down to the waist, pale face, and glowing amber/orange jewelry: a V-shaped chain necklace across the chest, orange bands at the wrists and a glowing headpiece over the brow. Back view shows the full white hair fall and the orange belt chain.
chars.mobIdea: The Witch Queen — hovering caster boss, shadow bolts + hex

chars.who: Same slate-blue gowned witch queen, now wearing a wide-brimmed pointed dark blue-gray witch hat that shadows the upper face and hides the hair from the front. Same glowing amber necklace/bracelets/belt chain, same legless flared gown.
chars.mobIdea: Witch Queen (hatted) — phase-1 appearance; drop the hat sheet on phase 2

chars.who: Witch queen in a deep crimson/scarlet floor-length gown with gold chain necklace, gold wrist bands and a gold belt chain; long silver-white hair, pale face, no hat. Legless flared hem, same gliding pose set.
chars.mobIdea: Crimson Witch Queen — fire/blood variant boss

chars.who: Crimson-gowned witch queen wearing a matching wide-brimmed pointed RED witch hat. Gold chains at the neck and waist, silver-white hair spilling out the back (visible in the 'up' row), flared legless skirt.
chars.mobIdea: Crimson Witch Queen (hatted) — coven leader NPC/boss

chars.who: Blue-skinned djinn. Bare muscular torso with arms folded across the chest, thick gold armbands and gold bracelets, a gold sash/belt. Below the belt the body dissolves into a tapering column of blue vapor — no legs. Small dark topknot/turban and pointed ears. A separate drop shadow sits under him: he hovers.
chars.mobIdea: Djinn of the Lamp — floating caster, wind/gravity abilities; can't be knocked down

chars.who: Grander royal djinn. Blue skin, huge banded purple turban with a gold gem clasp and a red flame-like plume rising off it, gold shoulder rings and heavy gold arm bracelets, blue vest over a bare blue chest, purple-and-gold sash. Lower body tapers into purple/blue vapor; hovering (drop shadow below).
chars.mobIdea: Djinn Sultan — boss, summons lesser djinn, ranged sand/wind bolts

chars.who: Blue-skinned female djinn dominated by an enormous starburst mane of wild blue flame-like hair radiating outward in long spikes (nearly twice the width of her body). Gold beads in the hair, gold earrings, a gold collar/bra and gold armlets and belt. Torso is blue and bare-midriffed; below the belt she tapers into a smoky wisp — no legs, hovering with a drop shadow.
chars.mobIdea: Djinn Enchantress — hovering boss add / caster, charm + fire nova

sheets.note: Only the top row of character blocks is populated; the bottom row is entirely empty. Each block's 3 columns are a squash/bounce cycle; the 4 rows are duplicates.

chars.who: Small green blob slime with a white specular highlight. Frames go tall-round -> mid -> flat pancake.
chars.mobIdea: Green Slime (matches the existing slime) — recolor family anchor

chars.who: Small blue blob slime with a white highlight, same squash cycle.
chars.mobIdea: Chill Slime — water/ice room filler, applies brief slow

chars.who: Not a blob: a standing tongue of orange-yellow FLAME with a rising flickering crest and a bright yellow core. Same 3-frame flicker/squash.
chars.mobIdea: Ember Wisp — Cinderrift trash mob, contact burn

chars.who: Tan/sand-colored rounded mound with five or six pale cream spikes/tendrils fanning up out of its top like a crown. Squashes flat like the slimes.
chars.mobIdea: Sand Burr — desert slime with spines, thorns/reflect on melee

A large emerald-green slime: a fat rounded dome with a darker green base rim and two white glossy highlight dots on the upper left. Three frames of a squash/settle bounce; all four rows identical (non-directional).
chars.mobIdea: Greater Slime — the thing a Green Slime splits FROM, or splits INTO two smalls on death

chars.who: A big golden-amber slime with white glossy highlights, wearing a small spiked orange-gold CROWN that sits half-sunk into the top of its body. Same squash/settle bounce, non-directional.
chars.mobIdea: Slime King — meadow open-world boss; splits into Greater Slimes at 50% hp, guaranteed gold-heavy loot

sheets.note: Mixed layout — see warnings. Blocks 0,0 and 0,1 are 3-column strips; the rest are single-column animation strips.

chars.who: A hooded phantom: pointed dark gray cowl with no face except two glowing teal eyes, ragged white-tipped tattered sleeves floating where arms would be, no legs (the robe frays into nothing). In its right hand it carries a small square teal-glowing LANTERN. Full 3-column strip, all rows front-facing.
chars.mobIdea: Lantern Phantom — crypt/graveyard wraith that carries the only light source in a dark room

chars.who: The same hooded gray phantom with glowing teal eyes and tattered sleeves, but WITHOUT the lantern.
chars.mobIdea: Doused Phantom — the same wraith after you break its lantern (phase 2, room goes dark)

chars.who: Middle column only: the lantern-carrying phantom again, 4-frame idle bob. Cols 0/2 empty.
chars.mobIdea: idle-only strip; use as an animated prop

chars.who: Middle column only: the phantom holding a brighter WHITE lantern, 4-frame idle. Cols 0/2 empty.
chars.mobIdea: Lit-lantern variant for a brighter light state

chars.who: Middle column only: a free-floating teal ghostly FLAME/wisp, flickering across 4 frames. No body, no face.
chars.mobIdea: Corpse-candle wisp — tiny ranged add, or a light-emitting decoration

chars.who: Middle column only: a very small teal spark that grows over 4 frames into a small flame. An ignition/spawn animation.
Middle column only: another teal ghostly flame/wisp flicker cycle, near-identical to 2,0 (slightly different frame shapes).
Middle column only: small teal spark growing into a flame, near-identical to 2,1.

A full blue-gray shark seen top-down. Row 1 (down): head-on from above, snout toward the viewer, open mouth showing a white sawtooth grin, pectoral fins spread, dorsal fin and tail trailing away. Rows 2-3 (left/right): classic side profile — pointed snout, black eye, gill slits, tall dorsal fin, crescent tail, pale white belly. Row 4 (up): swimming away, tail toward the viewer.
chars.mobIdea: Reef Shark — hostile water mob for deep water / sunken temple; body length ~3.5 m

chars.who: Identical shark art in a dusty brown/tan palette with a dark teal outline: head-on toothy view (down), two side profiles with black eye, gill slits, dorsal fin, crescent tail and pale belly, and a tail-on away view (up).
chars.mobIdea: Silt Shark — murk_water predator for Gloomfen's flooded runs

Wolf-headed beastfolk champion: gray wolf muzzle and tall pointed ears, dark steel plate armor with bright gold shoulder trim and a gold chest chain, and a long flowing CRIMSON CAPE that fills most of the back-facing frames.

chars.who: The same gray wolf champion in dark plate with gold trim and a red cape — all 12 frames face the camera, varying arm position (arms at sides, arms raised, hands out) and head tilt. NOT a directional walk grid; this is an emote/gesture set.
